entry.title: Adversarial QA Bounties — shipped
entry.summary: Break a published plugin, earn a permanent Hall entry — community red-teaming as a growth loop.

entry.title: Commit Craft v0.3.0 — shipped
entry.summary: Drafts conventional commits from the staged diff and guards message format at commit time.

entry.title: Hall of Prospectors & Patrons — shipped
entry.summary: Real contributor recognition — who suggested what shipped, who fueled what got built.

entry.title: Embeds & Badges — shipped
entry.summary: A shields-style status badge and an embeddable ticker — put the living machine on your own site.

entry.title: Env Doctor v0.1.1 — shipped
entry.summary: Checks the toolchain against the project's declared versions at session start and warns early.

entry.title: Field Reports — shipped
entry.summary: Real user experiences with shipped plugins, surfaced on their birth certificates.

entry.title: Fork a Foundry v0.1.1 — shipped
entry.summary: One skill that bootstraps your own self-running plugin workshop — the factory, shipping itself.

entry.title: The Fuel Gauge — shipped
entry.summary: The month's real API spend, on the window, against the operator's cap — with a Sponsor path to fund the next shift.

entry.title: Idea-Credit Loop — shipped
entry.summary: Community suggestions carry their prospector's name from issue to card to birth certificate — with a thank-you at every milestone.

entry.title: Night Clerk v0.2.1 — shipped
entry.summary: Ask Claude Code what plugin helps with X - the clerk searches the foundry catalog and hands you the install line.

entry.title: Plugin Smith v0.1.1 — shipped
entry.summary: Scaffolds new Claude Code plugins and health-checks existing ones against the official spec.

entry.title: PR Narrator v0.1.1 — shipped
entry.summary: A subagent that turns a branch's commits and diff into a reviewer-ready PR description.

entry.title: The Saga — shipped
entry.summary: An auto-generated timeline of the workshop's own story — ADRs, ships, kills, ceremonies.

entry.title: Session Recap v0.1.1 — shipped
entry.summary: Writes a structured recap when a session ends and recalls it when the next one starts.

entry.title: Shift Streak — shipped
entry.summary: A 12-week heatmap of the loop's real iterations — proof of life at a glance.

entry.title: Starter Kits — shipped
entry.summary: Curated bundles with one copy-block — cut choice paralysis for first-time installers.

entry.title: Test-Gap Nudge v0.3.0 — shipped
entry.summary: A polite Stop-hook that notices source changes with no matching test changes and says so once.

entry.title: Token-Cost Badges — shipped
entry.summary: Every card shows what a plugin costs your context — est. always-on tokens, and when it was last verified.

entry.title: Weekly Shipnote — shipped
entry.summary: A weekly digest the loop writes itself — shipped, moved, killed, fuel — posted as an issue every Monday.

entry.title: The Commission Queue — shipped
entry.summary: A sanitized public status board for commissions - patrons watch progress without asking.

entry.title: Contributor Cards — shipped
entry.summary: A shareable, kraft-styled SVG credit card per contributor - prospects, patronages, breaks, since-date.

entry.title: The Counter Index — shipped
entry.summary: Fuzzy search and tag filters on the shelf - find the right plugin in two keystrokes.

entry.title: Demo Transcripts — shipped
entry.summary: Certificates show the plugin working - a terminal-styled example session, honestly labeled until CI records the real thing.

entry.title: Live Shift Theater — shipped
entry.summary: A window page that replays the latest shift's journal as a slow-scrolling theater — watch the machine work.

entry.title: Releases & Weekly Re-verification — shipped
entry.summary: Tags become GitHub Releases with real notes; a weekly cron re-runs every published suite and re-stamps freshness.

entry.title: The Almanac — shipped
entry.summary: A monthly, auto-generated state-of-the-shift: ships, kill rate, cost per ship, the best defect the gates caught.

entry.title: The Mailbag — shipped
entry.summary: question-labeled issues get answered inside Monday shipnotes - office hours, kept by a machine.

entry.title: Traveler Pings — shipped
entry.summary: When a suggested idea changes stage, the original issue hears about it - suggesters watch their idea move down the line.

entry.title: Trust Card — shipped
entry.summary: A machine-generated footprint block on every plugin certificate - hooks, network, cost, uninstall.

entry.title: Window Watchability Pack — shipped
entry.summary: Next-shift countdown, the sharpest-questions wall, and an ergonomics pass - the window becomes worth returning to.

entry.title: Community Voting — shipped
entry.summary: Free plugin suggestions via GitHub issues, prioritized by 👍 reactions, surfaced live on the window.

entry.title: Scannable Window — shipped
entry.summary: Jump-nav, glanceable stats strip, and vote counts — the window readable in one sweep.
